layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: SINGLE-CONTAINER FORMAL TABLE LAYOUT. The slide uses a top-to-bottom orientation with the title at the top and a single full-width table container filling the remaining space. The table is designed using the Flat Geometry Table pattern (Section 4 Option C) appropriate for regulatory/legal/tax content. The layout maximizes vertical space utilization with generous padding around the table container to create a professional, uncluttered appearance. The table container has a white fill with a subtle light grey shadow glow for card lift, rounded corners, and no border. Content is distributed evenly across the available vertical space with dashed separator lines providing visual rhythm between rows without consuming excessive space.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: top-to-bottom
  Regions: 2
  Allocation: [0.12, 0.88]

Containers:
  C0 (FULL-WIDTH TAX CATEGORIES TABLE): This container holds a formal regulatory table showing multiple tax categories for virtual asset activities. The table uses the Flat Geometry Table design pattern (Section 4 Option C) which is mandatory for formal/regulatory/legal/financial content. STRUCTURE: The table has 4 columns (Tax Type, Rate, Applicable Activity, Legal Basis) with 4 data rows (Income Tax, Capital Gains, Excise Duty, Withholding Tax). COLUMN HEADERS: Plain bold text in brand dark color, left-aligned within each column, no filled header bar. Directly beneath each header label sits a small accent tab (brand primary color fill, very thin in height, narrow width relative to column, top corners slightly rounded, bottom edge square, left-aligned, positioned fully below the text without overlap). Immediately below and touching each accent tab is a thin solid horizontal line in brand dark color spanning that column's width only (with small white gutters between columns, not a single full-width line). COLUMN WIDTHS: Tax Type column sized to fit longest entry with small padding (~20% of table width). Rate column narrow (~12% of table width). Applicable Activity column widest (~40% of table width) to accommodate longer descriptive text. Legal Basis column moderate width (~28% of table width). DATA ROWS: Distributed evenly across remaining vertical space using equal flexGrow values. First column (Tax Type) cells have light grey fill rectangles (no border, no rounded corners, spanning most of row height, full column width) with bold brand dark text left-aligned with small left inset, vertically centered. Other three columns have plain body text on white background (no fill), vertically centered to align with the Tax Type label cell, left-aligned with small left inset. ROW SEPARATORS: Thin dashed grey horizontal lines between each data row (not after the last row), spanning full table width from left edge to right edge. FONT TREATMENT: All text uses body font. Column headers are bold, slightly larger or same size as body. Tax Type cells are bold. Rate, Applicable Activity, and Legal Basis cells use regular weight body text. Rate column text may use brand accent color to draw attention to the numerical values. SPACING: Content-aware spacing applies — this is a dense formal table with 4 data rows, so padding between rows is minimal and dashed separators provide the visual rhythm. Internal cell padding is small but sufficient to prevent text from touching cell edges. The container itself has generous outer padding on all sides to frame the table within the slide. VISUAL TREATMENT: The container background is white with a subtle even light grey shadow glow (no hard drop shadow) to create card lift effect. Rounded corners on the container (not on individual cells). No outer border on the container. The overall aesthetic is clean, formal, and regulatory-appropriate with no decorative fills or colored backgrounds except for the grey label cells in the first column and the accent tabs beneath headers.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): INACTIVE. The table container fills the slide well and does not require additional visual grouping or background treatment. The card lift effect on the table container itself provides sufficient visual separation from the slide background.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): INACTIVE. This slide contains a single table with no cross-container relationships, flow arrows, or overlay annotation elements. No top-layer connectors are needed.
